chat_api.description: Chat API Contract for AI Agent Integration

endpoint.description: Processes user messages through AI agent with MCP tool integration. Persists conversation state to database.
endpoint.authentication: JWT Bearer token required in Authorization header

message.description: User's natural language message to the AI agent
message.example: Add a task to buy groceries tomorrow

success.description: Agent successfully processed message and returned response

response.description: AI agent's natural language response to user
response.example: I've added the task 'Buy groceries tomorrow' to your list.

401.description: Authentication failed - missing, invalid, or expired JWT token

500.description: Internal server error - agent invocation failed or database error

503.description: Service unavailable - OpenAI API timeout or failure

execution_flow.description: Step-by-step execution flow for chat endpoint

steps.name: Authentication
steps.description: Extract JWT from Authorization header and validate using get_current_user dependency
steps.output: current_user: User object with user_id and email

steps.name: Request Validation
steps.description: Validate request body using Pydantic schema (message field required, length constraints)

steps.name: Get or Create Conversation
steps.description: Query database for user's most recent conversation or create new one
steps.database_query: SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

steps.name: Load Conversation History
steps.description: Load recent messages from conversation (last 50 messages for context)
steps.database_query: SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ? ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

steps.name: Persist User Message
steps.description: Save user's message to database before agent invocation
steps.database_operation: INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content, timestamp) VALUES (?, 'user', ?, NOW())

steps.name: Prepare Agent Context
steps.description: Build context for agent with conversation history and user_context

steps.name: Invoke Agent
steps.description: Call OpenAI Agent with user message, history, and tool catalog

agent_config.system_prompt: You are a helpful task management assistant...

steps.name: Persist Agent Response
steps.description: Save agent's response to database after successful invocation
steps.database_operation: INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content, timestamp) VALUES (?, 'assistant', ?, NOW())

steps.name: Update Conversation Timestamp
steps.description: Update conversation's updated_at timestamp to reflect recent activity
steps.database_operation: UPDATE conversations SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?

steps.name: Return Response
steps.description: Return agent's response and conversation_id to frontend

stateless_guarantees.description: Stateless architecture guarantees for chat endpoint
guarantees: No in-memory conversation state - all state persisted to database
Each request loads conversation history from database
Agent has no memory between requests
Multiple server instances can handle same user's requests
Database is single source of truth for all conversation data

rules: JWT token MUST be validated before processing message
user_context MUST be extracted from validated JWT token
Conversation MUST be filtered by current_user.id
Messages MUST be filtered by conversation owned by current_user
MCP tools MUST receive user_context for authorization
Cross-user conversation access MUST be prevented

error_handling.description: Error handling strategy for chat endpoint

strategies.action: Return user-friendly error message, do not expose token details
Return specific validation error (field name, constraint violated)
Log error for monitoring, return generic error message to user
Return user-friendly timeout message, suggest retry
Log error with request ID, return generic error message
Rollback transaction, log error, return error to user

body.message: Add a task to buy groceries tomorrow

body.response: I've added the task 'Buy groceries tomorrow' to your list.

You have 3 tasks:
1. Buy groceries tomorrow
2. Finish project report
3. Call dentist
Great! I've marked 'Buy groceries tomorrow' as completed.
